jobComments.content: Job entered. Waiting on frame delivery from distributor, expected 3/3.
Frame still backordered. Contacted rep, new ETA is 3/10. Patient notified of delay.
This job has been sitting in Job Created for over 3 weeks. Please escalate with distributor or offer patient an alternative frame.
Sent to EyeTech Labs. Tracking #ET-88421. Estimated turnaround 7-10 business days.
Lab called: Transitions lens in patient's Rx is on backorder. Alternative is Transitions XTRActive. Left VM for patient to confirm.
Patient approved XTRActive. Lab notified, resuming production.
Prism verification done. Both lenses within 0.25 diopter tolerance. Patient can pick up anytime.
B+L confirmed shipment. Trial set arriving separately, should be here by Thursday.
Received from Vision Lab. Checking PD measurements and seg heights before dispensing.
QC passed. Progressive corridor is centered, AR coating is clean. Moving to ready for pickup.
Redo approved. Original lenses had edge chipping visible at 10x. Sending back to Vision Lab with note to use polished edge finish.
Vision Lab acknowledged redo. New lenses expected by end of week. No charge.
This order has been in Job Created for over a week. Patient hasn't come in to select frames yet. Should we call to follow up?
Valley Contax confirmed receipt of molds. Scleral lens fabrication takes 2-3 weeks for keratoconus cases.
Still waiting on specialty lab. This is past the 10-day mark. Called Valley Contax for update, they said shipping Monday.
Sent to Vision Lab today. Highlighted the edge work requirements for 1.74 hi-index in a large frame.
Redo authorized. Original axis was 10 degrees off on OS per lensometry check. Vision Lab agreed to remake at no charge.
New lenses in production. Lab says 5 business days. Patient wants them shipped to home address on file.

jobFlags.summary: VIP patient. Dr. Mitchell's referral. Ensure prism Rx is verified by doctor before dispensing.
RUSH ORDER. Patient leaving for international trip 3/20. Expedite with Premium Optics.
Redo job. Lab quality issue on original. Track closely to ensure replacement lenses pass QC.
Keratoconus patient. Specialty scleral lenses from Valley Contax. Requires doctor follow-up at dispense.
Insurance dispute. VSP pre-auth for redo approved but need to submit claim within 30 days of dispense.
Pediatric patient (minor). Parent must be present at dispense to verify fit and sign off.
